calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-30-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn For Default Prove Up Hearing; Case Summary; Req. To Have Witness Appear By Dec. And Have Live Testimony Waived At Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-09-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Peter Henry Liederman, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff, Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. A National Banking Association.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Enayat Kazemi.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1 - 10 dismissed without prejudice.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $106,102.15
Costs: $482.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $106,584.65
Judgment signed in open court.
